nasb.text: It was a handbreadth thick, and its brim was made like the brim of a cup, as a lily blossom; it could hold two thousand baths.

esv.text: Its thickness was a handbreadth, and its brim was made like the brim of a cup, like the flower of a lily. It held two thousand baths.

cnv.text: 銅海厚七公分半，邊緣好像杯子的邊緣，又好像百合花蕾，能盛水四萬公升。

ccb.text: 铜海厚八厘米，边如杯边，又如百合花，容量是四万四千升。
